@anastasia\_malakhova Thank you so much for your valuable feedback. We have gone through the issue. It has resolved the bug. You can refresh the page it will show accurate data with the option to buy plans. PS: We have updated the pricing for the plans due to high API costs.

Multi-Million Dollar Design Services

Today, we have added the First 3 scans free for our new free users to try out our AEO tool. It will give an overview of the features and how you can get the most value from it.   
  
Check your domain AI Visibility:  

Chilarai M
Swytchcode

Swytchcode

Great tool! Congrats on the launch.

Nirav Suthar
Multi-Million Dollar Design Services [...] Anastasia Malakhova

Overall a cool idea, and I would definitely want to use it - but only once it starts working properly. I encountered errors during the initial set up, e.g. when I was creating an account I tried to sign in via Google but for some reason it opened Replit instead; when going through "Select Test Prompts" section it didn't let me progress to the next step saying "failed to save prompts". The numbers in the Overview section also seem random I think - I tried to test the page I just launched and the dashboard says "0 citations; 8.3% increase from the last period" - where it took the 8.3% number - I have no idea.

Hopefully this is a helpful feedback - would love to give it another try later on!

Nirav Suthar
Multi-Million Dollar Design Services [...] Nirav Suthar
Multi-Million Dollar Design Services

Multi-Million Dollar Design Services

Launched new features with better UI, AEO Trends intelligence, Citation in-depth page, MCP server with Claude and much more.

results.title: 5,000 customers, £20k spent: everything we did to market our AI startup (w/ free resources) : Meet-Ting Discussion Forums | Product Hunt
results.content:
## 11. Analytics

As a one-person team trying to keep an eye on the funnel and all the different channels, I need a simple way to watch what’s happening.

Social followers. Website traffic. Traffic quality. Where we’re getting mentioned. Where we’re not getting mentioned. Whether answer engines are picking us up.

I use Dojo AI to pull a lot of that together into a simple chat-style interface I can query.

You need to know what is working.

## 12. AEO

AEO, or answer engine visibility, is really more of a by-product of everything else.

I don’t think of it as some totally separate magic channel.

It’s what starts happening when you do a lot of other things well. [...] Dan Bulteel
Meet-Ting

Meet-Ting

@ismaelyws We worked with a small AEO agency at the very start thinking it would be an edge and it was an area we didn't know - true waste of time, needed to study ourselves, meant less focus and additional stress for me, but upon reflection why was it ever a good idea to not become more of an expert there! Probably wasted £1k over a few months

Johanna John

Loved the honestly about newsletter traffic vs retention. So many people only talk about top-of-funnel wins, not the actual quality of users.

Dan Bulteel
Meet-Ting

Meet-Ting

@johanna\_john1 Definitely got a bunch of low quality users, there was one AI listing site we used free credits to test their PPC, was just bot traffic

Hans Desjarlais
Hello Inbox

Hello Inbox [...] and titles that cover our space. I also signed up to HARO so pitch when I can. Busywork but really important for better AEO and getting a Wikipedia one day!

results.title: Justblank: Free AEO analytics with content tools to boost AI rankings | Product Hunt
results.content:
We’re live today and would love your feedback especially what you want us to build next.

Mike  
Maker, JustBlank

Fernando Scharnick

@mike\_teitelman2  This hits a really real shift that a lot of teams are still underestimating. As AI becomes the first place people ask questions, “SEO-only thinking” starts to feel dangerously incomplete.

I like that JustBlank isn’t just saying “you’re missing from AI answers” but actually ties that to which prompts matter, who’s winning instead, and what content to create next. That action layer is usually what’s missing in visibility tools.

Curious to see how teams start treating AEO as a first-class growth channel rather than an experiment. Big congrats on the launch, Mike, excited to see where this goes

Mike Teitelman

### Top reviewed [...] A new AEO Content Hub that lets you create content around prompts and ICPs, designed to help your brand appear inside LLM answers.  
Create AEO ready content that is structured and optimized for AI discovery not just traditional SEO.

🔍 What you can do with JustBlank

See how ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and others mention your brand  
Track competitors and co mentions inside AI answers  
Discover high volume prompts your audience is already asking  
Create and edit AEO optimized content directly in the platform  
Understand why you’re winning or losing AI visibility not just that you are

We built JustBlank for marketers, founders and teams who don’t want to fall behind as AI becomes the default search experience.
